objective.value: Build and verify only the fixture-independent foundation for Kea's credential-free Milestone 12 demo while deliberately deferring the approved sanitized fixture, public demo command, and completion claim.

approaches.value: Extract an explicit-recording analysis boundary and add isolated demo orchestration that reuses Kea's production analysis, persistence, disposition, and report pipeline with an injected provider.
A dispensable unsupported approach included to demonstrate rejection of a nonexistent citation.

humanInterventions.value: The human bounded the work to fixture-independent demo infrastructure, required design approval before edits, prohibited final fixture assets and completion claims, and required isolation from real observer data.
humanInterventions.justification: The opening message imposed scope, sequencing, privacy, and non-completion boundaries.

humanInterventions.value: The human narrowed the approved design by deferring the public demo command and constraining the extracted boundary and output-root behavior.
humanInterventions.justification: The approval rejected broader parts of the proposal and redirected implementation to a smaller fixture-independent slice.

turningPoints.value: The narrowing correction redirected the work from a broader preliminary demo proposal to the isolated fixture-independent orchestration that was subsequently implemented.
turningPoints.confidenceReason: The correction immediately follows the broader proposal and precedes captured implementation activity reflecting the narrower scope.

codexContributions.value: Implemented the explicit-recording analysis boundary, protected demo-output orchestration, manual CLI delegation, and focused isolation tests.
Diagnosed focused-test failures, corrected the implementation, and ran the complete typecheck and 133-test suite successfully.

reportedOutcome.value: Codex reported that the fixture-independent Milestone 12 foundation was committed and verified with 133 passing tests, while the final fixture-backed demo assets and command remained intentionally unfinished.

independentlySupportedOutcome.value: Captured result and repository evidence supports that commit b685c95 contains the isolated demo-orchestration foundation, the working tree was clean, all 133 tests passed, and no final fixture or public demo package script had been added.

evidenceGaps.value: The recording cannot establish that the final credential-free reference demo works end to end because the approved fixture, deterministic expected outputs, and public demo command were intentionally deferred to later work.

leadershipInsights.value: The committed work is supported as a reviewable foundation rather than a completed Milestone 12 deliverable; release readiness still depends on adding and verifying the approved fixture-backed, credential-free demo.
leadershipInsights.confidenceReason: The narrowed scope, successful verification, repository contents, and final reported remaining work consistently support this readiness boundary.
